feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How we removed Fiscal year Number Ranges
entry.content:
Hi PERSON_NAME,
I have maintained the Fiscal year DIGITS for continue document number ranges but still is picking up DIGITS Fiscal number ranges.
How we can delete or removed Old fiscal year number ranges.
please see the screen shot.
Thanks 
Rakesh PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: CO-object Error on Asset Retirement with revenue
entry.content:
Hi Expert

We are facing the issue while trying to retire an asset with revenue from books. The issue is coming that system asking CO-Object while the same already been assigned with asset master and the same in showing at time of simulating the entry but still showing the error. Please arrange to check and guide us where the gap is.

entry.title: Importing FSV to Cutomizing environment
entry.content:
On SAP S4C , I need to create an FSV identical to one from another project. Is there a way to copy or import it into the new system (Cutomizing environment) without having to recreate it manually via an external file?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: BADI for Delivery note(item)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Currently, I am working in delivery note form. I have explored all badi that available in item lavel. But when am trying to trace the custom logic, I dont see any BADI triggering for item Lavel.

Do we have any other BADI available to change/modify item lavel.

Please note, I have implemented both header and item lavel BADI, but only header lavel BADI is triggering, no item lavel BADI is triggering in this case.

Let me know, if i need to try other business context.

Regards,

Jagadhatri

ABAP Extensibility 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to perform a reversal for a stored material in SAP Public Cloud?
entry.content:
In the SAP Public Cloud system, a goods receipt for serialized materials was posted to the WM warehouse upon receiving the delivery. However, since the serialized materials were previously stored under a different warehouse number in WM stock, the ERP goods receipt could not be completed despite the WM goods receipt being finalized. As a result, there is a stock inconsistency between WM and ERP.

How can a reversal process be performed for a material that has completed the WM goods receipt and has been stored at its final destination?

entry.title: Purchase order price enhancement in S4 hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

I am currently trying to do an enhancement for PO price in S4 hana public cloud system, I don't find a appropriate BADI for price enhancement. Then I considered to put a routine in "purchasing price calculation schema", but I cannot find where to define the routine for purchasing price. 

Currently I assigned a "Routine" in the "Requirement" field, but based on the testing, this is not useful for PO.

 

Maybe because this Routine was defined under SD module, I defined the "Routine" and "Assigned the Enhancement ID to routine" in below path, based on the testing, it only works for SO.

Could you please help if you know how can I activate this enhancement to PO?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Mass uploader for stock correction
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I have a requirement of having a uploader where the users can upload the excel file and the system can do the stock correction according to each line.

Anyone know what would be the ideal way to approach this requirement?

entry.title: How to see the PR history I approved?
entry.content:
Dear sap,

I want know where can I check the PR lists I approved before? Because in "My Inbox" app, I can only see the PR waiting my approval. but can't see any history I approved.

Thanks

entry.title: #COE#RFL01-Some SSCUI are displayed in Quality and not in Production
entry.content:
Dear All, 

We're still discovering SCCUIs that are displayed and accessible in quality by the App  Manage your solution, but that can't be seen in manage your solution in production.

For example the SSCUI 100066 we can display the SSCUI with the app manage your solution in quality system, BUT we can not display the SSCUI with the app manage your solution in Production system. 

Does anyone know how can we have a complete list of SSCUI that are visible in Qual and not in prod, so that we don't have to check roles every time? 

I've searched for notes and haven't found any answer to this question.

Thank you very much for your help. 

Best regards, 

Mouna

#SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Change Currency in app 'Product profitability with Production Variance'
entry.content:
We are using the FIORI app 'Product Profitability with Production Variance,' which displays data in the controlling area currency (i.e., USD). However, we haven't found any option to change the currency in this report. We would like to view this report in the company code currency."


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: XBLNR Down payment request
entry.content: In Spain, it is necessary to report down payments with VAT. When making an Automatic Payment in SAP Public Cloud, the XBLNR field is not carried over from the down payment request. How could the field be carried out in the automatic payment execution?

entry.title: Details on Allowed File Types, Sizes, and Number of Attachments in Customer Master Data
entry.content:
Need detailed information regarding the allowed file types, sizes, and the number of attachments that can be uploaded when creating a new customer in the Manage Customer Master Data app.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Propose IBAN in Bank Master Data of Business Partner during Data Migration or Mass Change
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to generate the IBAN for a multiple selection of Business Partners at once in the S/4Hana Cloud, Public Edition?

Via Data Migration, it is only possible to directly enter the IBAN. We would like to generate those automatically with the Data Migration or do a Mass Change - is this possible? Or do I always have to click manually at the propose IBAN button for each Business Partner?

 

Thanks

entry.title: #COE#TAIT Service contract and service order billing plan and actual billing CDS view
entry.content:
Hi expert,

I want to find service contract and service order billing related CDS view. Thank you.

entry.title: Cannot go back to a previous period in Close peridod app?
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

I understand that in SAP Public Cloud, it is not possible to go back to a previous period in the Close Period app. Could you please confirm if this is correct?

If I still need to reopen the previous period, what steps should I take? Are there any workarounds or alternative solutions available?

Looking forward to your guidance.

Best regards,

entry.title: Production Order Operation - CDS View for Standard Machine and Labor Hours
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

From which CDS View can I get Standard Machine and Standard Labor hours of Production order.

 

I found the values are in Production Order - Operation Details. Kindly help in getting the CDS View.

Thanks in advance.

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: eInvoice details on Invoice form
entry.content:
Hello Team,

The business requirement is to send invoice forms with eInvoice details like IRN number and QR code as soon as billing document is created through an email to a customer. 

Once the invoice document, billing output changes its status to complete instantly. If eInvoice is not triggered for it, eInvoice details are missing from billing form.

Can you please let me know how to achieve this where as soon as billing document is created, email will be triggered to customer with eInvoice details without any delay and manual intervention.

Regards,

entry.title: Worker ID to be the same in both the IAS production system and the S4 system?
entry.content:
Hi,


We have created some users in the S4 production system (Manage Workforce app) with a different Worker ID than in the IAS production system. Is it PERSON_NAME for users to have the same Worker ID in both IAS and S4 systems? If so, is there a way to delete users from the S4 production system (Manage Workforce)?


Regards,


Vidisha


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Change document for Custom Field changes not available
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,


In Custom Fields apps, we have made changes in business context & added custom fields. This app only shows Creation details & Last Change details in administration but change log is not available.


Please let us know how we can access the change logs for the changes made in custom fields.


Let me know in case any additional information required.


Regards,


Yash Sali


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Unable to login to SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Unable to login to the SAP S/4HANA public cloud tenant with 'Global User ID'.
